nasb.text: He overlaid it with pure gold, its top and its sides all around, and its horns; and he made a gold molding for it all around.

esv.text: He overlaid it with pure gold, its top and around its sides and its horns. And he made a molding of gold around it,

cnv.text: 又用純金把壇包裹，壇頂、壇的四邊和壇的四角都包裹，又替壇做了金牙邊。

ccb.text: 坛顶、坛的四面和坛上的角状物包上纯金，四周镶上金边。
